title: Maintainer-Facing Maturity Wave Documentation Note
prompt: Read `./maturity-wave-request.md`, `./public-lifecycle-summary.md`, and `./maintainer-audience.md`. Work only from those files. Do not ask follow-up questions. If you need assumptions, state them briefly and continue. Produce a short maintainer-facing documentation artifact that explains where durable skill-maturity knowledge should live, what minimum evidence is needed before a skill can reach tested, and how to distinguish durable docs from transient notes. Keep it direct, audience-aware, and not changelog-like.

assertions.name: stays-concise
assertions.description: Keeps the note compact rather than turning into a long dump

assertions.name: answers-document-location-decision
assertions.description: Explains where durable knowledge should live and why

assertions.name: names-audience-and-authority-boundaries
assertions.description: Makes the maintainer audience and authoritative sources explicit

assertions.name: distinguishes-durable-from-transient
assertions.description: Separates durable documentation from transient notes or changelog material

assertions.name: avoids-changelog-narration
assertions.description: Does not drift into changelog-style narration
